metadata.title: SBMM ABP Surface Soil Sampling — Rounds 1 & 2 (R2 VALIDATED)
metadata.note: Round 2 analytical data is VALIDATED (Case 52633). Several near-detection-limit Sb/Tl/As results were re-qualified as non-detect due to equipment-blank contamination (Linda Wilson, Jacobs project chemist). Round 1 and EA Historical data are unchanged.

properties.not_sampled_reason: Access issue - overgrown vegetation and trees blocking access.
Not sampled - location is outside the area of concern and a haul road will be constructed over this location; data gap no longer relevant.

properties.field_note: Characterization - data gap in eastern area, shallow bedrock expected
properties.not_sampled_reason: Access issue - location could not be accessed.

properties.field_note: Delineation - fill gap between SS32 and ABWP02-22 hot zones

properties.not_sampled_reason: Access issue - heavy vegetation blocking access.
